# Examples

## Reference builds (run-locally apps generated by the orchestrator)

- [helpdesk/](built/helpdesk/) — B2B support ticketing system. Exercises ~17
  skills and most specialists. Recommended starting point for understanding
  what claude-app-orchestrator can produce.

Each reference build keeps its blueprint plus README and EXPECTED_OUTPUT in
version control. The actual generated `app/` subdirectory is gitignored
(see [`built/.gitignore`](built/.gitignore)) — run the orchestrator locally
to produce it.

## Blueprint examples (templates to copy and modify)

See [`blueprints/examples/`](../blueprints/examples/) at the repo root for
blueprints organized by app type:

- `todo-app.yaml` — minimal v1 starter
- `dashboard-spa.yaml` — client-side SPA shape
- `notes-api.yaml` — standalone API (Hono)
- `saas-platform.yaml` — full v2 (tenancy + RBAC + integrations + jobs)
- `webhook-integration.yaml` — inbound webhook patterns
